message:
fix: Complete AST traversal in analyzeModule.zig and statements.zig

Add comprehensive handlers for for_stmt.orelse_body, while_stmt.orelse_body,
try_stmt (handlers, else_body, finalbody), with_stmt, and match_stmt to:

analyzeModule.zig:
- inferReturnTypeFromBody (expanded nested block traversal)

statements.zig:
- visitStmtScoped (added with_stmt handler)
